name: Tag
description: Punched price tags swinging to a new angle, re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(16% 16%, 70% 16%, 96% 50%, 70% 84%, 16% 84%); clip-path: polygon(16% 16%, 70% 16%, 96% 50%, 70% 84%, 16% 84%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 22%; top: 44%; @size: 12%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color0); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
